tasks.name: Review Q1 metrics report
tasks.description:
Prepare for the **2pm leadership sync**.

## Focus areas
- Revenue vs. forecast
- Churn rate trends
- Pipeline health by segment

> Check the [dashboard](https://example.com) for latest figures before the meeting.

tasks.name: Deploy hotfix to production
tasks.description:
**Critical bug** in checkout flow causing payment failures for *~12% of users*.

### Root cause
Race condition in the `Stripe webhook handler` — duplicate events processed concurrently.

### Steps
- Fix the race condition with idempotency key
- Run integration tests
- Deploy via CI/CD

> Branch: `fix/checkout-payment-bug`

tasks.name: Daily standup notes
tasks.description:
Template:
- What I did yesterday
- What I'm doing today
- Any blockers

tasks.name: Call dentist to reschedule
tasks.description:
Office number: **555-0142**

Ask about *evening availability* — the 3pm slot doesn't work anymore.

tasks.name: Research competitors' pricing
tasks.description:
## Competitors to check
- Acme Corp — [pricing page](https://example.com)
- Widget Inc — recently raised prices
- FooBar — offers a free tier

Look at **annual vs. monthly** pricing and any volume discounts.

tasks.name: Buy birthday gift for mom
tasks.description:
She mentioned wanting:
- A new *cookbook* (Mediterranean?)
- Something for the **garden**
- That candle brand she liked last year

tasks.name: Set up CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description:
Use **GitHub Actions** for the pipeline.

### Stages needed
- `lint` — ESLint + Prettier check
- `test` — Jest unit + integration
- `build` — Production bundle
- `deploy` — Push to staging, then production

```yaml
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
```

See the [Actions docs](https://docs.github.com/en/actions) for workflow syntax.

tasks.name: Write unit tests for auth module
tasks.description:
Cover the following flows:
- Login (valid + invalid credentials)
- Password reset (token generation + validation)
- OAuth callback handling

Aim for **>80% coverage** on `src/auth/`.

tasks.name: Plan weekend hiking trip
tasks.description:
## Trail options
- **Eagle Creek** — 12 mi, moderate, waterfall views
- **Silver Falls** — 8 mi, easy, good for the group
- **Mt. Tabor** — 3 mi, easy, close to brunch spots

Confirm with the group by Thursday.

tasks.name: Build landing page
tasks.description:
Use the Figma designs from Sarah.

### Sections
- **Hero** — headline, subhead, CTA button
- **Features** — 3-column grid with icons
- **Social proof** — testimonial carousel
- **Waitlist signup** — email input + CTA

> Keep it *fast* — target < 2s LCP. No heavy frameworks.

tasks.name: Design approval on mockups
tasks.description:
Sent mockups via **Figma link** to the design team.

Need sign-off on:
- Color palette update
- New navigation pattern
- Mobile layout changes

*Can't proceed with front-end build until approved.*

tasks.name: Learn Rust programming language
tasks.description:
## Learning plan
1. Start with [The Rust Book](https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/)
2. Focus on **ownership model** and **borrowing** first
3. Build a small CLI tool as practice
4. Try `tokio` for async

> *Don't rush it* — understanding ownership deeply is more valuable than covering everything superficially.

tasks.name: Remodel home office
tasks.description:
### Upgrades
- **Desk** — standing desk, 60" wide minimum
- **Monitor arm** — dual arm mount for 27" displays
- **Acoustic panels** — felt panels on the wall behind the desk
- **Lighting** — bias lighting strip behind monitors

---

Budget: *~$1,500* total

tasks.name: Write technical blog post
tasks.description:
## Topic ideas
- **Local-first apps** — why offline matters
- **SQLite in production** — when it's the right choice
- **Building with LLM APIs** — practical patterns

Pick one and outline before writing. Aim for *~1500 words*.

tasks.name: Migrate database to PostgreSQL
tasks.description:
**On hold** pending infrastructure budget approval from finance.

### When unblocked
- Run schema migration scripts in `/scripts/db`
- Test against staging data
- Coordinate with DevOps for production cutover

> Estimated downtime: *~15 minutes* with blue-green deploy.

notes.body: Found discrepancies in the revenue figures — **Q3 numbers** don't match finance's records. Flagging before the presentation.
Data team confirmed it was a reporting pipeline bug. Dashboard figures are now corrected. *Good to present.*
Root cause: race condition in the `Stripe webhook handler`. Fix is in review — CI passing, one approval needed.
Followed up with Jake on Slack. He said the team will have feedback by **Friday EOD**.
